name: anti-crawl-b
description: Agent needs to scrape a different technical forum (e.g., a Chinese developer forum) for error logs. Same blocking pattern.

setup.repo_state: Agent needs to fetch content from a different protected web page
setup.error_message: Failed to fetch web page: TLS handshake timeout, SNI blocking detected. curl, requests, scrapling all failed.

expected_outcome.avoids_dead_end: don't retry with different HTTP library — same TLS layer will block
fix_commands: Use proxy (Clash, V2Ray) to bypass SNI blocking
Or use open-source alternative (GitHub mirror, API)
Or use MisakaNet lesson knowledge directly

measures: Whether agent retrieves anti-crawling lesson and applies proxy/alternative approach
